name: xchatbot
description: Cloudflare Workers 消息处理机器人

scripts.dev:pull: npm run data -- run sync:pull && npm run dev
scripts.dev:seed: npm run data -- run kv:seed:local && npm run dev
scripts.plugin-admin:smoke: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.tmp-plugin-admin-smoke',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc -p tsconfig.json --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --outDir .tmp-plugin-admin-smoke --rootDir src && node ./_docs/scripts/plugin-admin-smoke.cjs
scripts.deploy:safe: npm run data -- run sync:pull && npm run typecheck && npm run deploy
scripts.deploy:safe:push: npm run data -- run sync:push:force && npm run typecheck && npm run deploy
